description_long: This sculpture depicts an angelic figure with a serene face, folded arms, and prominent wings extending from its back. The figure's body forms a conical, bell-like base, with subtle surface imperfections and a matte, dark finish. The facial features are softly modeled, and the arms are crossed over the chest, conveying a sense of calm or contemplation. The wings are thick and stylized, merging smoothly into the back of the figure. The surface shows some small chips and irregularities, suggesting it is hand-crafted from a ceramic or clay material. The overall form is simple yet expressive, with a focus on the angel's upper body and wings.
description: A dark, matte-finished angel sculpture with crossed arms, stylized wings, and a conical base. The figure is serene and hand-crafted, with visible surface imperfections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angel's face, crossed arms, and both wings clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the face, one wing, and the sloping conical base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both wings, and the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the base.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the side of the face, one wing, and the curvature of the base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an urban park, plaza, or garden.
